Read the full advertisement and instructions carefully before beginning the application.
Register on the portal and create a login if you are a new user.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details.
Upload all required documents as specified.
Pay the application fee of ₹200/- online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard).
Submit the application on or before 31 July 2026.
Download and save the confirmation of your submitted application for future reference.
E-Admit Cards can be downloaded from the SPSC website after the Commission publishes a notice for the same.

Important: The Commission will not be responsible for any application submitted after the stipulated date and time. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid last-minute technical issues.

content_sections.heading: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 - Overview
content_sections.text: This recruitment is exclusively for local candidates of Sikkim. Posts are in Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service. Only online applications are accepted - no other mode of submission will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Sikkim PSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 - Notification PDF
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: To apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper 2026, candidates must be local candidates of Sikkim and must fulfil all prescribed eligibility conditions - including educational qualification and age - as on the closing date of 31 July 2026 . Candidates awaiting final results are not eligible to apply, as per Notification No. 177/GEN/DOP dated 29.01.2026. Candidates must satisfy both of the following requirements: Class XII passed (or equivalent) from any recognized Board, with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class X (Ten) . Must have knowledge of basic computer applications and possess a certificate or diploma of at least 3 (three) months basic course in computer application , or a higher qualification in computer science / information technology from a recognized board/university. Must be able to read, write, and speak in one of the State languages of Sikkim. Must be conversant with local customs and traditions of Sikkim .

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Breakdown - Category-Wise Distribution
content_sections.text: The total 50 vacancies are distributed across multiple reservation categories as per the Government of Sikkim's reservation policy. Women candidates have specific reserved posts in several categories; where sufficient eligible women candidates are not available to fill 33% of the reserved posts, those unfilled vacancies will be filled by male candidates of the same reserved category as per Notification No. M(14)/136/GEN/DOP dated 26.11.2018. In addition to the above, posts are also reserved horizontally for Persons with Disabilities (PWDs), Sports Persons and Artisans of Excellence (SPAE), Ex-Servicemen (ESM), and Paramilitary Forces & Assam Rifles (PFAR) as follows: Persons with Benchmark Disabilities: Blind & Low Vision - 01 post Deaf & Hard of Hearing - 01 post Locomotor Disability including Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims & Muscular Dystrophy - 01 post Autism, Intellectual Disability, Specific Learning Disability and Multiple Illness - 01 post Sports Persons and Artisans of Excellence (SPAE): WSS - 01 post BL - 01 post OBC (CL) - 01 post Ex-Servicemen (ESM): OBC (CL) - 01 post OBC (SL) - 01 post Paramilitary Forces and Assam Rifles (PFAR): GEN - 01 post There will be no carrying forward of roster points reserved for SPAE, ESM, and PFAR. If sufficient eligible candidates are not available, unfilled vacancies will be filled by candidates belonging to the same reserved category.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: The only date specified in the official notification is the last date for submission of applications. Candidates must ensure their online application is submitted well before the deadline, as SPSC will not be responsible for applications submitted after the stipulated date and time. The last date to apply online for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 is 31 July 2026 . Applications submitted after this date will not be accepted under any circumstances.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Applications

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026 is ₹200/- (Rupees Two Hundred only) . This fee is applicable to all candidates and must be paid online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard) . The fee once deposited is non-refundable and cannot be adjusted against any other purpose.

rows.payment_mode: Net Banking / Credit Card / Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: SPSC will conduct a Written Examination for shortlisting candidates. The detailed scheme and pattern of the written examination is available in Appendix - I of the official notification, and the syllabus can be downloaded from the Sikkim Public Service Commission website at www.spsc.sikkim.gov.in . The selection stages are as follows: Written Examination - Candidates are admitted provisionally, subject to satisfying all eligibility conditions. Document Scrutiny - Candidates who qualify in the written examination will be called for verification of original documents. Shortlisted candidates must submit attested photocopies of all relevant documents on the dates specified by the Commission. Admission to all stages of the examination is purely provisional. If, at any stage during the process, a candidate is found to have not fulfilled the eligibility conditions, their candidature will be cancelled without notice. No TA/DA is admissible for attending the examination. Candidates must bring a Photo Identity Proof (Aadhaar Card, Voter's Card, or Driving Licence) along with a valid e-Admit Card at the examination centre.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will be placed in Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service under the Finance Department, Government of Sikkim. However, during the period of Probation, Apprenticeship, or Training, pay shall be governed by Notification No. 489/GEN/DOP dated 31.10.2011.

rows.pay_matrix_level: Level-7 (Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service Pay Matrix)

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must be in possession of the following documents at the time of application and document verification. All documents listed are mandatory as per the official notification.

rows.details: Sikkim Subject Certificate or Certificate of Identification issued by the competent authority under relevant orders of the State Government
Issued by the competent authority of the Government of Sikkim
Valid Local Employment Card issued by the appropriate authority of the Government of Sikkim
From the Head of Department - applicable for currently employed candidates
For female candidates; married women must enclose COI/SSC of husband

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications are accepted online only through the official SPSC website. Applications received through any other mode will not be accepted and will be summarily rejected. Candidates must read all instructions provided on the website carefully before filling in the form. Important: The Commission will not be responsible for any application submitted after the stipulated date and time. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid last-minute technical issues.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Even eligible candidates can face rejection due to avoidable errors during the online application process. Keep the following in mind: Candidates awaiting final results are not eligible to apply. You must have your Class XII result in hand as on 31 July 2026. Ensure your photo and signature files meet the portal's prescribed format and size before uploading - incorrect file formats or oversized images are common reasons for failed submissions. Do not attempt payment multiple times if the gateway appears to fail. Check your bank account first before retrying - the ₹200/- fee is non-refundable even in case of technical failures at payment stage. Use a stable internet connection and an updated browser to avoid form timeouts while filling in or submitting the application. Save your login credentials and application number immediately after registration - the SPSC portal communicates all updates through your registered account. Apply early - do not wait until 31 July 2026. Server load increases on the last day, which can cause slowdowns or submission failures. Any further instructions, corrigendum, or addendum will be published only on the SPSC website - check www.spsc.sikkim.gov.in regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 31 July 2026. Applications submitted after this date will not be accepted, and SPSC will not be responsible for late submissions.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 50 posts of Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper are available under Advertisement No. 21/SPSC/EXAM/2026, distributed across multiple reservation categories including UR, BL, OBC, ST, SC, Primitive Tribe, Most Backward Classes, and WSS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class XII (or equivalent) from a recognized Board with Mathematics as one of the subjects in Class X. Additionally, a certificate or diploma of at least 3 months basic computer application course (or higher) from a recognized board/university is mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 40 years of age as on 31 July 2026, as per Notification No. M(3)/(55)/GEN/DOP/Pt.III dated 03/07/2019.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹200/- for all candidates, payable online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card (Visa/MasterCard). The fee is non-refundable once paid.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for Accounts Clerk / Junior Storekeeper in Sikkim?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed at Level-7 of the Pay Matrix of the Sikkim Sub Ordinate Accounts Service under the Finance Department, Government of Sikkim. During probation/training, pay will be as per Notification No. 489/GEN/DOP dated 31.10.2011.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of a Written Examination followed by Document Scrutiny. Candidates who qualify in the written exam will be called for verification of original documents on dates specified by the Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Is this recruitment open to candidates from outside Sikkim?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is exclusively for local candidates of Sikkim. Candidates must possess either a Sikkim Subject Certificate or a Certificate of Identification issued by the competent authority of the State Government.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online at the official SPSC website: http://spsc.sikkim.gov.in/. No other mode of application is accepted. Applications received through any other means will be summarily rejected.

faq.question: Q10. Can employed candidates apply for SPSC Accounts Clerk 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, but employed candidates must submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their Head of Department at the time of document verification. Currently employed candidates in any government department must obtain this NOC before appearing for document scrutiny.
